org.bytedeco.javacpp.tools

Class NativeAllocationTracer

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.bytedeco.javacpp.tools.NativeAllocationTracer

  • public class NativeAllocationTracer
extends Object
    Tracks native memory allocation sites and provides usage statistics for debugging memory lifecycle. Captures the source code location where Pointer objects are created and monitors allocation, deallocation, and garbage collection events for each site.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  NativeAllocationTracer.Location
      Represents a specific location in source code identified by class, method, file, and line number.
      static class  NativeAllocationTracer.Site
      Contains allocation statistics for a specific source code location.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static Logger logger 
      private static WeakHashMap<Pointer,NativeAllocationTracer.Location> pointerLocations
      Maps for remember where each Pointer object was created
      private static WeakHashMap<PhantomReference<Pointer>,NativeAllocationTracer.Location> pointerReferenceLocations
      Maps phantom references to allocation sites for GC-time tracking
      private static HashMap<NativeAllocationTracer.Location,NativeAllocationTracer.Site> sites
      Maps source code locations to their allocation statistics

      Constructor and Description

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private static NativeAllocationTracer.Location captureCreationLocation(Class<?> createdClass)
      Captures the location in the source code where an instance creation occurs.
      static Collection<NativeAllocationTracer.Site> getSites()
      Retrieves a collection of all currently tracked allocation sites.
      private static void markPointer(Pointer pointer)
      Associates a Pointer with its creation location for future tracking
      private static void markReference(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference, Pointer pointer)
      Associates a Pointer Reference with its allocation location for tracking during GC.
      private static void recordAllocation(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference, long size)
      Records when native memory is allocated, updating total and live statistics.
      private static void recordCollection(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference, long size)
      Records when native memory is garbage collected, updating collection statistics.
      private static void recordDeallocation(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference, long size)
      Records when native memory is manually deallocated, updating live statistics.

    • Field Detail

      • logger

        private static final Logger logger

      • sites

        private static final HashMap<NativeAllocationTracer.Location,NativeAllocationTracer.Site> sites
        Maps source code locations to their allocation statistics

      • pointerLocations

        private static final WeakHashMap<Pointer,NativeAllocationTracer.Location> pointerLocations
        Maps for remember where each Pointer object was created

      • pointerReferenceLocations

        private static final WeakHashMap<PhantomReference<Pointer>,NativeAllocationTracer.Location> pointerReferenceLocations
        Maps phantom references to allocation sites for GC-time tracking

    • Constructor Detail

      • NativeAllocationTracer

        public NativeAllocationTracer()

    • Method Detail

      • getSites

        public static Collection<NativeAllocationTracer.Site> getSites()
        Retrieves a collection of all currently tracked allocation sites.
        Returns:
        a collection of Site objects representing the allocation statistics

      • markPointer

        private static void markPointer(Pointer pointer)
        Associates a Pointer with its creation location for future tracking
        Parameters:
        pointer - the Pointer object to be marked and tracked

      • markReference

        private static void markReference(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference,
                                  Pointer pointer)
        Associates a Pointer Reference with its allocation location for tracking during GC. First attempts to retrieve the location from the associated Pointer, then falls back to capturing the current stack frame location if not found.
        Parameters:
        pointerReference - the phantom reference to be marked and tracked
        pointer - the Pointer object associated with the phantom reference

      • recordAllocation

        private static void recordAllocation(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference,
                                     long size)
        Records when native memory is allocated, updating total and live statistics.
        Parameters:
        pointerReference - the phantom reference associated with the allocation
        size - the number of bytes allocated

      • recordDeallocation

        private static void recordDeallocation(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference,
                                       long size)
        Records when native memory is manually deallocated, updating live statistics.
        Parameters:
        pointerReference - the phantom reference associated with the deallocation
        size - the number of bytes deallocated

      • recordCollection

        private static void recordCollection(PhantomReference<Pointer> pointerReference,
                                     long size)
        Records when native memory is garbage collected, updating collection statistics.
        Parameters:
        pointerReference - the phantom reference associated with the garbage collected memory
        size - the number of bytes garbage collected

      • captureCreationLocation

        private static NativeAllocationTracer.Location captureCreationLocation(Class<?> createdClass)
        Captures the location in the source code where an instance creation occurs. The method extracts the stack trace information, skipping frames related to Pointer class constructors and internal tracer calls to identify the actual call site where the object instantiation was initiated.
        Parameters:
        createdClass - the class of the object being created
        Returns:
        the Location object containing class, method, file and line information, or null if the location could not be determined
